title: ItemChat
description: Server-side mod allowing players to display items in chat.
body:
# ItemChat
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/Fallen-Breath/fabric-mod-template.svg)](http://www.gnu.org/licenses/lgpl-3.0.html)
![workflow](https://github.com/Alex3236/ItemChat/actions/workflows/gradle.yml/badge.svg)

Server-side mod allowing players to display items in chat.

By default, add `[i]` when sending a chat message. First `[i]` will be replaced with the hoverable item text. You may change the pattern in the config file.

## Client or Server?

Server side only, including "Open to LAN".
